name: Grade 1 Painting & Mixed Media — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: National Core Arts Standards
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Painting & Mixed Media pathway.

units.title: Investigate: first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to first-grade application, project work, reflection, and sharing in Painting & Mixed Media.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
